name: grind-camp-functions
description: Cloud Functions for Grind Camp email notifications

scripts.deploy: gcloud functions deploy sendRegistrationEmail --runtime nodejs18 --trigger-http --region europe-west1 --set-env-vars ALLOWED_ORIGINS=https://grindcamp.fr,https://www.grindcamp.fr --set-secrets GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD=GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD:latest,ADMIN_EMAILS=ADMIN_EMAILS:latest
scripts.deploy:dev: gcloud functions deploy sendRegistrationEmail --runtime nodejs18 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --region europe-west1
